message:
chore(test): regenerate conformance report, add proptest regression, extend review dates

Regenerate the extension conformance report with current timestamps
(2026-04-13). Extend review_by dates on 5 known waivers from 2026-03-31
to 2026-06-30 — these cover multi-file dependency resolution gaps that
remain open. Fix the qualisero-pi-agent-scip entry point link from
dist/index.d.ts to dist/index.js.

Add a new proptest regression case for the tools module discovered
during fuzz testing (cc a308f4e5...).

Add codex-clippy/ directory pattern to .rchignore to exclude Codex
clippy working directories from remote compilation syncs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
